text:

  H.I.C. & D.B.S.   OS/2 Warp   Hellas  
  ServerConfig   ConfigEdit   OS/2 UK UG  
  Live fast, die young, and leave a handsome corpse.  

.þ. Dark is the night, like blackest coal. I brood and brood,
my heartbeats toll. We Vistani live like no others do,
Suffering pain, and hunger too.  -From A Vistani song
